Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IBridgeEventCollector

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Collects bridge call events in a bounded buffer for DevTools consumption.

public interface IBridgeEventCollector

Properties

Capacity

Maximum number of events the buffer can hold.

int Capacity { get; }

Property Value

int

Count

Current number of events in the buffer.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

DroppedCount

Number of events dropped due to buffer overflow.

long DroppedCount { get; }

Property Value

long

Methods

Clear()

Clears all buffered events and resets the dropped count.

void Clear()

GetEvents()

Returns a snapshot of all buffered events, oldest first.

IReadOnlyList<BridgeDevToolsEvent> GetEvents()

Returns

IReadOnlyList<BridgeDevToolsEvent>

Subscribe(Action<BridgeDevToolsEvent>)

Registers a callback invoked whenever a new event is added. Returns a disposable that unregisters the callback.

IDisposable Subscribe(Action<BridgeDevToolsEvent> onEvent)

Parameters

onEvent Action<BridgeDevToolsEvent>

Returns

IDisposable
